column66: Apr 15: Allen (hamstring) has been ruled out for Tuesday's Play-In Tournament game against the Trail Blazers.
Apr 15: Post (foot) has been ruled out for Wednesday's Play-In Tournament game against the Clippers.
Mar 24: Moody has been diagnosed with a torn patellar tendon in his left knee, Shams Charania of ESPN reports.
Apr 15: Isaac (knee) won't play in Wednesday's Play-In Tournament game against the 76ers, Jason Beede of the Orlando Sentinel reports.
Feb 10: Butler underwent successful surgery Monday to repair a torn right anterior cruciate ligament.
Apr 9: The Hornets announced Thursday that Hall underwent a procedure to address a fractured right ankle and will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 campaign.
Apr 11: Cryer (ankle) will be re-evaluated in one week after an MRI confirmed a right-ankle sprain.
